reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service, it's a constant at ACA. I won't charge if there's another option.

reviews.comment:
Los muchachos atentos pero no había productos , una gran falta de organización!

(Translated by Google)
The staff were helpful but there were no products, a huge lack of organization!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPcnEzMG5RRRAB

reviews.comment:
De 10,, llegué con el frío 07:30 y me sirvieron muy rico café y panales ( facturas, también medias lunas )de membrillo y batata calentitos..

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! I arrived in the cold at 7:30 and they served me delicious coffee and warm quince and sweet potato pastries (both pastries and croissants).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPLXF1ZEdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención del personal de isla, rápida la carga de nafta🙌

(Translated by Google)
Great service from the island staff, and the fuel fill-up was quick! 🙌
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPNnJLb3p3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre! El personal es obsoleto. Me intentaron vender nafta en efectivo sin ticket.
De noche 3 autos media hora esperando y otros 20 minutos para cargar nafta.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster! The staff is obsolete. They tried to sell me gas for cash without a receipt.
At night, three cars waited half an hour and another 20 minutes to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPOHNPTTNRRRAB
